title: Asplenium × lawalreei
taxonomy: Asplenium × lawalreei is a hybrid species of the Asplenium genus, which belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It is a result of the cross between two different Asplenium species. The exact classification and parent species of Asplenium × lawalreei may vary depending on the source. However, it is generally classified as a member of the Asplenium genus, which includes a large number of species of ferns. Further research may be needed to determine the specific classification and parent species of this hybrid.
